Precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both robot arms are free.
Postcondition: The robot holds box_1 with both arms.

Precondition: The robot is holding box_1 and the area to the right of box_2 on the table is clear.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table to the right of box_2 and the robot arms are free.

Precondition: box_1 is no longer on box_2, box_2 is accessible, and both robot arms are free.
Postcondition: The robot holds box_2 with both arms.
